name: add-your-name@dscc.org
subject: Nevertheless, she persisted (again!)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
Today was not the first time a female senator was warned, given an explanation, yet nevertheless, she persisted.
---
**[](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e55a/2b07114c/28c9f66f/736f1ea1/588960557/VEsH/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/let-senate-democrats-speak?source=PT-20170607-AddYourName_DS-ProsHV")**
Team -- Today was not the first time a female senator was warned, given an explanation, yet nevertheless, she persisted.

No, today, that senator was Kamala Harris from California who represents Democrats on the Senate Intelligence Committee.

Harris was in the process of questioning Attorney General Rod Rosenstein -- who fired James Comey -- on whether or not the special counsel appointed to investigate President Trump's ties to Russia would have full independence.

Demanding a simple yes or no answer, she was then cut off by TWO Republican Senators, told to stop asking questions by the Senate Intelligence Committee chair, and scolded to be _" courteous."_ No male Senators were interrupted during the hearing.

**These attempts to stop strong women leaders from seeking out justice is all too familiar. And we 're not going to tolerate it anymore.**

[**We 're asking you stand with Senator Harris, team. Just like we stood with Elizabeth Warren when she persisted, we need to have her back too. Add your name >>**](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e55a/2b07114c/28c9f66f/736f1ea1/588960557/VEsE/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/let-senate-democrats-speak?source=PT-20170607-AddYourName_DS-ProsHV")

For the record, Senator Harris was not alone, surrounded by male colleagues, in aggressively questioning intelligence leaders on their accountability.

But for some reason, the way she stood up for Americans who deserve answers on Trump's Russia ties rubbed two GOP Senators the wrong way.

These moments demand an immediate response to show we're standing in solidarity with Senate Democrats, team -- no matter what obstacles they face from Republicans.

[**Click here to show the GOP our women senators WILL NOT be intimidated or silenced from speaking out on issues that matter to Americans. Add your name today.**](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e55a/2b07114c/28c9f66f/736f1ea1/588960557/VEsF/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/let-senate-democrats-speak?source=PT-20170607-AddYourName_DS-ProsHV")

Thanks for fighting back,

Team DSCC

name: Marco Rubio
subject: SURVEY ENCLOSED FOR dpwillis67@gmail.com
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
Friend, can you let me know what you think by answering this very quick survey?
| [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/42698838:sdBXo92jN:m:1:1328517760:8B369CF299D92B8F4AB883036635F8B4:r)
---
Friend,

I need the advice and support of grassroots activists like you now more than ever.

**I am conducting my annual survey of voters in Florida and all across the nation to find out how you feel about the progress Republicans in the U.S. Senate have been making and where you want us to focus our attention for the rest of the year.**

We have begun 2017 by rolling back major portions of the Obama agenda, especially many of his job-killing regulations. A new pro-Constitution U.S. Supreme Court Justice has been confirmed, and legislation on health care, border security and tax reform is in the works.

But obviously, there is much left to be done to turn our nation around.

**That's why I am reaching out to find out which issues you believe our Republican majority in the United States Senate should prioritize in the coming months. Will you please let me know by clicking on the button below?**

| [** 2017 Senate Leadership Survey
START NOW >>>>> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/42698838:sdBXo92jN:m:1:1328517760:8B369CF299D92B8F4AB883036635F8B4:r)
---

Friend, your opinions matter to me. I appreciate all you did during 2016 to help my campaign and I want to make every effort possible to keep in touch with you, listen to your feedback and address your concerns.

I am proud to be a leading voice for conservative reform, fiscal responsibility and a renewed national commitment to a foreign policy of "peace through strength."

There has been an awful lot of discord in Washington, D.C. since the last election. The liberal Democrats have used every stalling tactic and method of delay they can find to slow confirmation of administration appointees and try to block passage of reform legislation.

Their bitter obstructionism is an embarrassment to the institution of the U.S. Senate and an insult to the American people. The Democrats have put partisanship before the best interests of the country on issue, after issue, after issue.

And the biased media "echo chamber" repeats and amplifies the liberals' bitter attacks and phony misrepresentations of our Republican agenda.

**But I know that the Democrats and their allies in the media don't speak for Main Street Americans like you.**

[** 2017 Senate Leadership Survey
START NOW >>>>> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/42698838:sdBXo92jN:m:1:1328517760:8B369CF299D92B8F4AB883036635F8B4:r)
---

That's why conducting my own grassroots opinion poll is so important to me.

Friend, the information gathered from my 2017 Senate Leadership Survey will help Republican leaders and me target legislative efforts to ensure that grassroots Republicans are focused and ready to act in support of our actions.

**So please, take a few minutes to complete the survey right away.**

Thank you for your steadfast support and continued commitment to our nation.

Sincerely,

Marco Rubio

[** 2017 Senate Leadership Survey
START NOW >>>>> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/42698838:sdBXo92jN:m:1:1328517760:8B369CF299D92B8F4AB883036635F8B4:r)
---

name: The White House
subject: Your 1600 Daily
body:
1600 Daily Everything White House for 6/8/2017. |
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=b212b18df39bd71a71d1a51da20eb17a17888dfb32978e49b41a6d7ba95f8220135ed498faae8bf37142b39b14124afac18ecabb1f61d69b

President Donald J. Trump is following through on his promise to rebuild the country's infrastructure. Yesterday in Cincinnati, Ohio, the President announced his infrastructure initiative that gives states and localities the ability to address their own critical infrastructure needs and to collaborate with private enterprises where it makes sense. It is time to recapture our legacy as a nation of builders — and to create new lanes of travel, commerce, and discovery that will take us into the future.

Today's Events

12:00 PM: Press Gaggle with Principal Deputy Press Secretary Sarah Sanders

12:20 PM: Vice President Pence joins Secretary of Transportation Elaine Chao and Director of the Office of Management and Budget Mick Mulvaney for an Infrastructure Summit Working Luncheon

12:35 PM: President Trump gives remarks at Faith and Freedom Coalition’s Road to Majority Conference -
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=b212b18df39bd71a236e940c983c512bcfab2e22815732d55a5d27367c3834a0596b841e4f51326dd6ca1dfcfa96d35e98f3d090b1438d11
Watch

2:00 PM: Vice President Pence participates in a bilateral meeting with President Nicos Anastasiades of Cyprus

3:30 PM: President Trump hosts an Infrastructure Summit with Governors and Mayors

Photo of the Day

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=b212b18df39bd71a5646273642b0f14c713199f1d52344300f0bb0f6e0830cae4732aac1bfba31560fe1943e9afe6e3b8fc67e8c03911a3f

President Donald J. Trump announces his infrastructure initiative | June 7, 2017 (Official White House Photo by Shealah Craighead)

WHITE HOUSE UPDATES

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=b212b18df39bd71adf35d384cd2d3c3b320f9e86115de5ad86fa20f09ed4962286221c144dc7822f9a1db24737a36de10bf1111cc96b05b6
announced his initiative to rebuild America's crumbling infrastructure. "Americans deserve the best infrastructure anywhere in the world."

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=b212b18df39bd71aaf0f2a6e6ad1d61d2b3084cadcaedf9239c694c2af413544074a59ab393454325d5baca67f5032269f4792bb4eea1a5e

President Trump announced he will nominate

Christopher Asher Wray as the new Director of the Federal Bureau of Investigation.

twelve additional nominations to the Senate.

As President Trump moves forward with his infrastructure initiative, here is a

look back at six infrastructure projects from the Department of Interior that benefit Americans every day.

clean_body: Hey Derek, Investing in the Party is the first step to Republican victory in 2018. The NH Republican State Committee played a huge part in my victory last year, as well as helping maintain our majorities in Concord. Thank you--to you and to Republicans like you who generously contribute to the NHGOP. The NHGOP makes it easy to invest in our operation for a RED 2018 with the Grassroots Circle ( ). Peter,

Today, former FBI Director James Comey testified to the Senate.

He discussed his conversations with President Trump before Trump fired him and possible coordination between Trump's campaign and Russia during the 2016 election.

This is the moment we needed senators to step up and demand answers.

Two of our champions in the Senate, Dianne Feinstein and Kamala Harris, didn't hold back asking Comey questions. And they have already spent this week asking tough questions of other national security and intelligence officials.

Americans deserve the truth, and these EMILY's List senators are going to help make sure we get it.

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: a moment of truth
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
| __
Former FBI Director James Comey's appearance before the Senate Intelligence Committee today is a moment of truth for Americans.

We learned that President Trump tried to intimidate the former FBI Director about an ongoing investigation. He wanted the director to stop the investigation into the former National Security Adviser, Michael Flynn, and his Russian contacts -- despite the fact that Russia had attacked our democratic process and intervened in our elections.

We also know that when Comey did not comply, Trump fired him.

Why would President Trump seek to protect Michael Flynn - someone who lied about the extent of his contacts with Russia, failed to disclose payments he received from foreign governments, and hid the truth on his security clearance application?

[**We are at a pivotal moment. We must get to the bottom of this, no matter where it leads. President Trump 's behavior is indefensible. He needs to come clean to the American people and we need to know the truth about Russia's intervention in our elections. If you agree, add your name to stand with me. **](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91bf9/70cdc2ba/476c47ff/397c965/308102913/VEsH/ "https://cvanhollen.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/sign-stand-with-chris-to-continue-the-investigation?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+We+are+at+a+pivotal+moment+We+must+get+t&utm_campaign=em060817&source=em060817")

The President of the United States wanted to shut down an investigation leading directly to the doors of the White House.

I'm not sure what is more stunning: the president's behavior and his apparent willingness to cross ethical and legal boundaries to get his way, or the refusal of Congressional Republicans to admit the Russia intervention poses a serious national security threat and to demand we get the truth.

[**We must hold President Trump and Congressional Republicans accountable for their actions and their efforts to stall this investigation to find the truth.**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91bf9/70cdc2ba/476c47ff/397c962/308102913/VEsE/ "https://cvanhollen.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/sign-stand-with-chris-to-continue-the-investigation?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+We+must+hold+President+Trump+and+Congres&utm_campaign=em060817&source=em060817")

Thank you,

Chris

name: Jeff Weaver, OurRevolution.com
subject: The Washington Post has a bad track record
body:
Tom has led on every progressive policy in this race
#
Sisters and Brothers,
When Tom Perriello launched his campaign for governor of Virginia, he did it without regard for what the establishment might say or who was "next in line." He launched his campaign on a bold, progressive platform because it was right--and because for too long families in this country have not been given a fair shot. Now polls show he is in a position to win despite his opponent's much bigger war chest.
In addition the establishment is rushing in to stop Tom. Some, like those at the Washington Post, believe that Democrats should run as "Republican-lite." When the Washington Post endorsed Tom's opponent, they specifically cited his close relationship with Republicans and their pitch to get him to switch parties.
We all remember when the Washington Post editorial writers went after Bernie day after day. Now that they are supporting Tom's opponent we know we are on the right side. If we as progressives are not taking dramatic steps to fix the problems in this country, we will not win elections and we are not doing what's right for working families. The Post didn't get it right in 2016--with disastrous results--and they don't get it now.
[**Will you help show it's time for bold progressives who will not waver in our commitment to working families? Make a contribution of $27 to Tom Perriello and send a powerful message across the country.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0da9/43f17890/d02b68b9/62037cee/1113663551/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-perriello?refcode=em170608-full")
Tom has led on every progressive policy in this race--bold action on climate change, rejecting contributions from the state's largest corporate donor and utility, free community college, a living wage of $15--and the establishment believes this is a strike against him.
This fight is bigger than Virginia. I remember with great appreciation the support you gave Bernie during some tough fights. Our movement needs you more than ever. This is one of the most important Democratic primaries this year--and I can guarantee you that candidates, the media, and people across the country are watching to see what happens here.
The choice is between a bold progressive or an establishment candidate who voted for George W. Bush, twice. Between incremental and fundamental change. And between a party that fights for aggressive action on the issues we care about or a party that is defined by not rocking the boat too much.
[**Make a contribution of $27 to Tom Perriello before Election Day, June 13 and show the country what type of candidates and party we need.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0da9/43f17890/d02b68b9/62037cee/1113663551/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-perriello?refcode=em170608-full")
In solidarity,
Jeff Weaver

name: Brandon Wolf
subject: Resilience after Pulse
body:
Help us keep my best friend Dru's legacy alive.
#
_In honor of the anniversary of the tragedy at Pulse Orlando, Brandon Wolf is taking over our email program for the day to invite each and every one of you to participate in a special event. We hope you'll join him. - Team Gillum_
Friends --
It has been a year since Christopher Andrew Leinonen, his partner Juan Ramon Guerrero, and 47 other innocent and beautiful lives perished on Orange Avenue. Since then, we have taken time to reflect, gather our strength, and find a proactive way to deal with the most atrocious mass shooting on U.S. soil in our nation's history.
My name is Brandon Wolf and I am a survivor of the Pulse Nightclub shooting. I am also the Vice President of The Dru Project, a nonprofit launched to keep my best friend Drew's name and legacy alive.
A year ago, I was hiding in front of a urinal on the floor of a bathroom at Pulse. The scent of smoke and blood still comes to me at night when I am trying to fall asleep. I can't remember sleeping with the lights off. There are nights where I can't sleep at all. I would not wish these feelings on anybody, but I would suffer through this for the rest of my life to have Drew and Juan back.
Unfortunately, the reality we are facing is that they will never be back. So what several friends and I have done is the next best thing: [**Keeping these names alive by turning our sadness and grief into action.**](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb330f/9e00690/4a87fca1/24037d23/904296947/VEsH/ "http://thedruproject.org/take-action/") With that, we embarked on a journey of creating and launching a nonprofit - not the easiest feat, we've learned! But on this journey, we have also learned so much about ourselves. The most important lesson being resilience. I would dare to say that a majority of the citizens of the City of Orlando have learned this about themselves this past year. We, as loving human beings, are resilient. We, as a community, are resilient.
[**The Dru Project is about to throw a launch and memorial party on June 11th**](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb330f/9e00690/4a87fca1/24037d22/904296947/VEsE/ "http://thedruproject.org/store/launch-party-ticket") and we will be giving out our first Spirit of Drew Scholarship to a young LGBTQ+ person who exemplifies Drew's spirit - one of a desire for unity, inclusion, acceptance, and love. We are battling hatred with all we can to ensure the next generation never suffers from an atrocity like this.
Are you with us? **[If you can, join us on June 11th at The Abbey to celebrate too many beautiful lives cut short-including my best friend Drew's.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb330f/9e00690/4a87fca1/24037d22/904296947/VEsF/ "http://thedruproject.org/store/launch-party-ticket")**

[**If you can 't make it, we urge you to donate so that we can complete the curriculum for Gay-Straight Alliances by the beginning of the 2017-2018 school year.**](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb330f/9e00690/4a87fca1/24037d23/904296947/VEsC/ "http://thedruproject.org/take-action/") Drew started the first GSA at his high school in Seminole, FL, and we can only hope that he is proud of the work we are doing in his name. It won't bring him back, but it is keeping his spirit alive.
We would love if you embarked on this journey with us. Thank you for your time.
With love,
Brandon J Wolf
**[CONTRIBUTE](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb330f/9e00690/4a87fca1/24037d23/904296947/VEsD/ "http://thedruproject.org/take-action/")**

In honor of the anniversary of the tragedy at Pulse Orlando, Brandon Wolf is taking over our email program for the day to invite each and every one of you to participate in a special event. We hope you'll join him. - Team Gillum Friends -- It has been a year since Christopher Andrew Leinonen, his partner Juan Ramon Guerrero, and 47 other innocent and beautiful lives perished on Orange Avenue. Since then, we have taken time to reflect, gather our strength, and find a proactive way to deal with the most atrocious mass shooting on U.S. soil in our nation's history. My name is Brandon Wolf and I am a survivor of the Pulse Nightclub shooting. I am also the Vice President of The Dru Project, a nonprofit launched to keep my best friend Drew's name and legacy alive. A year ago, I was hiding in front of a urinal on the floor of a bathroom at Pulse. The scent of smoke and blood still comes to me at night when I am trying to fall asleep. I can't remember sleeping with the lights off. There are nights where I can't sleep at all. I would not wish these feelings on anybody, but I would suffer through this for the rest of my life to have Drew and Juan back. Unfortunately, the reality we are facing is that they will never be back. So what several friends and I have done is the next best thing: "" With that, we embarked on a journey of creating and launching a nonprofit - not the easiest feat, we've learned! But on this journey, we have also learned so much about ourselves. The most important lesson being resilience. I would dare to say that a majority of the citizens of the City of Orlando have learned this about themselves this past year. We, as loving human beings, are resilient. We, as a community, are resilient. "" and we will be giving out our first Spirit of Drew Scholarship to a young LGBTQ+ person who exemplifies Drew's spirit - one of a desire for unity, inclusion, acceptance, and love. We are battling hatred with all we can to ensure the next generation never suffers from an atrocity like this. Are you with us? "" "" Drew started the first GSA at his high school in Seminole, FL, and we can only hope that he is proud of the work we are doing in his name. It won't bring him back, but it is keeping his spirit alive. We would love if you embarked on this journey with us. Thank you for your time.
